rationale.fidelity: Correctly keeps seller type latent, uses one common score threshold, and maps the noisy-score error trade-off to expected platform payoff.
rationale.managerial_framing: The actor, trigger, feasible choice, stakes, mechanism, trade-off, counterfactual, and operational boundary are all concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Scholarly positioning is neither requested nor claimed; the response appropriately declines to assert novelty.
rationale.evidence_discipline: It clearly labels type-conditional score differences as assumptions and identifies the calibration and validation evidence still needed.
rationale.prose_clarity: Precise and well organized, though the repeated DFC and gate restatement is longer than needed.
rationale.overall: A fully faithful and evidence-bounded framing with only a modest economy-of-expression deduction.
